hero.h1: Your customers pay so you earn more.
hero.slogan1Sub: Optimize your cash flow by turning sustainability investment into direct capital to finance your monthly Shopify, Google Ads, and Hosting bills, transforming an operating cost into a regenerative growth engine for your brand.
hero.slogan2Sub: Eliminate the environmental impact of your logistics by achieving a true Zero operational footprint, leading the transition toward a circular e-commerce model where every return and shipment strengthens the ecosystem instead of harming it.
hero.slogan3After: The standard for the new economy.
hero.slogan3Sub: Guarantee customer trust through total, auditable transparency: every cent collected is traceable in real-time from checkout to the verified green project, eliminating any shadow of greenwashing.
hero.sub1: Sustainability that funds your growth. The
hero.sub4: goes directly to your account to pay Google Ads, Shopify, and hosting.
hero.tooltipBullet2: Guaranteed Green Operational Credit™ for the merchant.

howItWorks.h1Part1: Your green contribution splits in two.
howItWorks.subtitle: Every purchase with EcoTrace generates a green contribution that splits automatically: one part offsets real CO₂, the other funds your business.
howItWorks.exp1Text: 100% of these funds fund verified green projects (Gold Standard / VCS). Every cent is traceable and auditable under ISO 14064.
howItWorks.exp2Text: Funds return to your account to cover invoices for tech (Shopify), marketing (Google Ads), or hosting, provided these services demonstrate sustainability criteria. Your customers fund your growth.
howItWorks.ecoLogicTitle: Eco-Logic: the calculation engine that defines each Impact Factor
howItWorks.ecoLogicSubtitle: Each transaction is calculated in real time with auditable emission factors. Total transparency, zero black boxes.

solutions.title: Three solutions, one platform
solutions.subtitle: Each layer of EcoTrace solves a different business problem — from fee collection to financial recovery to compliance.
solutions.sol1Text: Seamlessly integrates into your existing shipping rates. No extra line items, no customer friction. The green contribution becomes a premium service upgrade, not an added cost.
solutions.sol1Bullet1: Shopify Functions Powered: millisecond-speed price mutation via Cart Transform & Delivery Customization.
solutions.sol1Bullet2: Anchoring Effect: integrated into shipping for a premium service feel — not a tax.
solutions.sol1Bullet3: Clean Invoicing: appears as a single 'Eco+ Certified' shipping service on receipts.
solutions.sol2Text: Manage Green Operational Credits™ to fund your Google Ads, Shopify subscription, and other operating costs. Your customers subsidize your margins — automatically.
solutions.sol2Bullet2: Google Ads & Shopify API integration for tax-shield
solutions.sol2Bullet3: Real-time wallet balance and transaction log
solutions.sol3Text: ISO 14064 / ISO 14067 reporting for EU 2026 regulations. Per-transaction evidence that sustainability directors and external auditors can reconstruct without consultants.
solutions.sol3Bullet1: Monthly Scope 3 reports ready for external audit
solutions.sol3Bullet3: Immutable data hashes for defensible green claims

profitability.title: The Profitability Engine
profitability.subtitle: Every green contribution is split into two streams. One funds the planet. The other funds your business.
profitability.card1Text: Every contribution is split: Certified Impact Offset funds verified projects. Green Operational Credit™ is credited directly to the seller's account.
profitability.card2Text: Google Ads & Shopify APIs validate that funds are reinvested correctly — useful for tax-shield purposes.
profitability.card3Text: Customers pay more for brands with verifiable, immutable data hashes. Transparency converts.
profitability.modal1Body1: Split explained: 100% of the Green Contribution collected first lands in an internal ledger, where every cent is tagged by order ID, country, shipping method, and marketing channel. On top of that dataset, the EcoTrace engine computes which share goes to certified offset portfolios and which share is reserved as operational credit. The logic is designed to be defensible under financial and sustainability audits, not just as marketing copy.
profitability.modal1Body2: Certified Impact Offset ensures regulatory compliance (ISO 14064) by linking your orders to baskets of verified projects (Gold Standard, VCS, Plan Vivo). For every kg of CO₂e calculated in logistics, an equivalent amount of certified credits is purchased, avoiding double counting and ensuring your positive-impact claims can withstand third‑party scrutiny.
profitability.modal1Body3: The Green Operational Credit™ generates immediate liquidity for the merchant, allowing you to reinvest in sustainable growth without touching core cash reserves. The system records which portion of that credit is used for Google Ads, Shopify, or other eligible providers, so you can demonstrate that each contribution has been translated into measurable growth (more traffic, more sales, more loyalty) rather than a simple tactical discount.
profitability.modal2Body1: Direct connection to Google Ads and Shopify data centers: EcoTrace does not rely on screenshots or spreadsheets, but on secure API integrations that read ad spend, subscriptions, and issued invoices. This enables a precise reconciliation between each unit of Green Operational Credit™ and a real transaction from a specific technology provider.
profitability.modal2Body2: Cash‑flow traceability: We verify that every cent of Operational Credit is spent on services with a carbon‑neutral footprint or robust decarbonisation commitments. The dashboard maintains a match history between customer contributions and invoices paid, so you can export an "origin → destination" report for green money by fiscal period.
profitability.modal2Body3: Automatic generation of Scope 3 reports ready for EU 2026 fiscal and legal audits: emissions, contributions, and reinvestment data are consolidated into a format aligned with CSRD and international frameworks (GHG Protocol, ISO 14064/67). The goal is for your legal team to hand auditors a complete dossier without reconstructing the history by hand.
profitability.modal3Body1: 73% of Gen Z consumers prefer brands with transparent sustainability data, but what truly drives conversion is the combination of positive impact and a clear financial narrative. When customers understand that their contribution is not a "green surcharge" but a shared investment that improves the store’s financial health, the perceived value of the order increases.
profitability.modal3Body2: The "Eco+ Shipping" integration removes cognitive friction: instead of adding an extra line item in the cart, the contribution is embedded into the shipping experience itself as a superior service (offset logistics, neutral parcels, priority for renewable‑powered providers). In UX terms, you are reframing a tax into a tangible upgrade.
profitability.modal3Body3: Immutable seal and trust proof: each transaction generates a unique hash certifying that the order has been neutralized and that the contribution followed the correct flow into a verified green project. This record can be surfaced in B2B reports, investor due‑diligence, or public transparency pages to reinforce trust without having to explain technical details at checkout every time.

widget.checkboxText: Yes, I want to offset the operational impact of my order.
widget.netZero: By completing your order with EcoTrace, the operational carbon footprint of your purchase is ZERO. Thank you for contributing to a cleaner planet!
widget.netZeroLead: By completing your order with EcoTrace, the operational carbon footprint of your purchase is
widget.netZeroTail: . Thank you for contributing to a cleaner planet!
widget.zeroImpactTooltipTitle: How do we achieve Zero Impact?
widget.zeroImpactTooltipBody: Shopping online generates CO₂ from shipping and servers. With EcoTrace, your contribution neutralizes that footprint: 1. Real Offset: You fund the absorption of the exact kg of CO₂ for your package. 2. Clean Tech: You help this store use carbon-neutral hosting and marketing. In the end, the total is Zero. You shop, the planet breathes.
